title: Vendor Pricing & Eligibility Config
description: Runtime-mutable per-vendor configuration (config, NOT hardcode). Supplies the metered-counterfactual price table and the role/modality eligibility values consumed by the Cedar hard-constraint filter. Editing this changes the routing topology without a redeploy (D4).

version.description: Monotonic version string stamped onto ledger entries for auditability.

maintenance_cost_usd_per_window.description: Trailing-window maintenance cost; the economic-kill tripwire fires when cumulative net savings drops below this.

key.description: Vendor key, e.g. claude_code, codex, gemini, opencode.

programmatic_eligible.description: Whether this vendor may be called programmatically under its current subscription terms. Claude=false on subscription; Codex/Gemini/opencode=true today.

data_residency.description: Optional residency tag used by the data-residency hard constraint.

frozen.description: Posture flag set by the ToS-diff / enforcement tripwires; when true the router excludes this vendor.

tos_clause_url.description: URL the ToS monitor fetches and hashes.

metered_pricing.description: Per-tier metered $ per million tokens, used for the counterfactual.
